description: Healthcare content and data compliance rules — gates what content workers can generate and ensures PHI protection. Loaded before any content generation in the healthcare vertical.

hard_stops.logic: ZERO patient information in any output. PHI detection in any input triggers refusal.
hard_stops.message: Patient health information detected. This content cannot be processed. Remove all patient-identifying information before proceeding.

hard_stops.logic: ZERO unapproved clinical claims. Any clinical efficacy claim requires regulatory disclaimer.
hard_stops.message: Clinical efficacy claims require regulatory disclaimers. Add appropriate disclaimers or remove the claim.

soft_guides.logic: NPI verification outputs include credential scope. NPPES data presented with provider scope and limitations.
soft_guides.guidance: When displaying NPI verification results, always include the provider's credential scope, specialty, and any limitations on practice.

automated_actions.logic: Educational purposes only disclaimer on all clinical content. Every healthcare output includes the disclaimer.
automated_actions.disclaimer: This information is for educational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional for clinical decisions.

automated_actions.logic: Drug reference outputs include prescribing disclaimer. Every openFDA output includes professional use disclaimer.
automated_actions.disclaimer: Drug information sourced from FDA labels. For professional use only. Verify all prescribing information against current FDA-approved labeling before clinical use.
